commissionPlan.title: Commission Plan
commissionPlan.subtitle: Invite friends and earn commissions
commissionPlan.introDesc: Invite friends to register as members and you will receive 20% commission on membership fees
commissionPlan.rule1: Become a VIP member to participate in the commission plan
commissionPlan.rule2: Invite friends to become members and you will receive 20% commission on membership fees
commissionPlan.rule3: Commissions will be automatically settled to your account within 24 hours after successful payment by friends
commissionPlan.joinVip: Become a VIP member and participate in the commission plan
commissionPlan.rule4: Account balance of 100 yuan or more can be withdrawn to WeChat or Alipay
commissionPlan.loadFailed: Failed to load data, please try again later
